snapshot.active_constraints: LLVM clang-cl, Ninja, vcpkg, C++17, DOD, Branchless, Zero Heap.
snapshot.key_knowledge: - FastAABB.h implemented with branchless intersection. - sketch.cpp configured for FASTAABB_RUN_TEST via setup() hook. - Build pipeline verified with LLVM/Ninja (clang-cl).
snapshot.artifact_trail: - include/FastAABB.h: Branchless 2D AABB intersection logic. - src/sketch.cpp: Updated switchboard and setup() callback. - build_env_config.json: Cached LLVM/Ninja paths. - state_snapshots/snapshot_20260331_204100.xml: Current state.
snapshot.task_state: ENVIRONMENT VALIDATION & SELF-HEALING TEST COMPLETED. Local build is clean (0 errors). sketch.cpp switchboard configured. Workspace ready for human developer (F5).
